posts.text:
The right will look at the failure of Trump's second term and say: The real problem is that we didn't Fight Hard Enough. 

It wasn't the ICE murders, the lawlessness, the corruption, the tariff idiocy, the groyper ideology. It was that we just didn't Fight Hard Enough


Noah Smith 🐇🇺🇸🇺🇦🇹🇼 (@Noahpinion)

Prediction: Just as on the left, there will be no learning. Zero.



— https://nitter.net/Noahpinion/status/2034950027810902212#m

posts.text:
Democrats have STILL not reckoned with how much people hate progressive ideology


Matthew Yglesias (@mattyglesias)

Trump approval is now below where he was in his first term. 

But views of Dems are worse than they were in 2018; definite need to try to come up with ways to do a "new look."
